data.title: Bitcoin vs Gold Debate Heats Up Between CZ and Peter Schiff – Here Is Why Their Clash Matters
data.description:
The ongoing debate between leading figures in the cryptocurrency and traditional investment sectors, specifically between Changpeng Zhao (CZ), the CEO of Binance, and Peter Schiff, a prominent advocate for precious metals, has intensified significantly. This clash holds substantial importance not only for their respective followers but also for the broader discourse surrounding the future of money and value storage. In this article, we will explore the reasons behind their fierce confrontation, the perspectives they bring to the table, and the implications of their arguments on the evolving financial landscape.
source: https://blocknews.com/bitcoin-vs-gold-debate-heats-up-between-cz-and-peter-schiff-here-is-why-their-clash-matters/

data.title: ‘Backed by nothing’: Peter Schiff says bitcoin can’t rival tokenized gold in debate with CZ
data.description:
Longtime gold advocate Peter Schiff said bitcoin’s demand is fading despite ETF inflows, corporate accumulation, and intense market hype.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/381404/backed-nothing-peter-schiff-bitcoin-cant-rival-tokenized-gold-debate-cz?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: CFTC Opens the Door to Regulated Spot Crypto Trading on U.S. Futures Exchanges – Here Is Why This Marks a Major Turning Point
data.description:
The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has officially initiated the process for allowing regulated spot cryptocurrency trading on U.S. futures exchanges, a significant development that could transform the landscape of digital asset trading in the country. This landmark decision is poised to reshape the regulatory framework surrounding cryptocurrencies and could usher in a new era of legitimacy and oversight for the crypto markets. Here, we explore the reasons why this move signifies a major turning point in the relationship between traditional financial regulations and the rapidly evolving world of digital currencies.
source: https://blocknews.com/cftc-opens-the-door-to-regulated-spot-crypto-trading-on-u-s-futures-exchanges-here-is-why-this-marks-a-major-turning-point/

data.title: BNB Drops Below 900 USDT with a 0.72% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 04, 2025, 17:40 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 900 USDT and is now trading at 899.950012 USDT, with a narrowed 0.72% decrease in 24 hours.
